sections.short-biography: Huang Jun was responsible for levying troops to fight the Yellow Turbans in AD 184. He arrived late to his duties and was almost executed by Inspector Liang Gu.

full_text:
Huang Jun
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Junwas born in Jiuquan. Huang Jun was responsible for levying troops to fight the Yellow Turbans in AD 184. He arrived late to his duties and was almost executed by Inspector Liang Gu. Huang Jun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
